summaryCards.title: Top Signal
summaryCards.narrative: The highest scoring signal blends momentum, novelty, and cross-source confirmation.

summaryCards.title: Cross-Source Confirmed
summaryCards.change: Signals seen in three or more source families
summaryCards.narrative: These are the safest candidates for immediate editorial action.

summaryCards.title: Internal Demand Gaps
summaryCards.change: GA4 terms with rising on-site demand
summaryCards.narrative: These terms often point to navigation gaps or missing explainers.

summaryCards.title: Watch List
summaryCards.narrative: These deserve a faster newsroom review loop than steady demand terms.

storyIdeas.headline: Move on factory farming protest before the broader cycle catches up
storyIdeas.rationale: High-scoring, cross-source confirmed terms should convert into quick-turn coverage or refreshed explainers.

storyIdeas.headline: Track whether puppy mills graduates from social chatter to search demand
storyIdeas.rationale: Signals with strong Reddit, Google News, or Google Trends movement but lighter site demand may be early indicators rather than immediate assignments.

storyIdeas.headline: Refresh foundational coverage around animal cruelty
storyIdeas.rationale: If a term rises in GSC and internal search at the same time, a clearer evergreen explainer or FAQ often pays off faster than net-new reporting.

storyIdeas.headline: Reduce friction where visitors search for topics the site still hides
storyIdeas.rationale: Repeated internal-search demand with weak organic landing-page alignment usually means the content exists but the path to it is poor.
